creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
> [javac] Creating empty /usr/ports/java/junit/work/junit-team-junit-c62e2df/target/main/org/junit/runner/package-info.class

This appears to be a build failure in the java/junit port, which is a dependency of openoffice.  A recent openjdk update apparently broke junit, but this was fixed for me by the update of junit to version 4.12 on 05/02/2015.
